title: Qiagen QIAmp PowerFecal Pro Extraction Protocol
author: Michael Dan Siemon
materials: Qiagen QIAmp PowerFecal Pro extraction kit

steps.title: Thoroughly mix wastewater sample then aliquot...
steps.instruction: Thoroughly mix wastewater sample then aliquot 40 mL into 50 mL Falcon tube. Centrifuge at 4500 x g for 120 min. Decant supernatant, assume 280 µl pellet.

steps.title: As a substitute for vortexing described...
steps.instruction: As a substitute for vortexing described in the kit protocol, bead-beating is used. Bead-beating is conducted 4x for 30s at 4 m/s.

steps.title: Add 650 μl of Solution CD1...
steps.instruction: Add 650 μl of Solution CD1 to the wastewater pellet and transfer solution to the PowerBead Pro Tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge the PowerBead Pro Tube at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the PowerBead Pro Tube at 15,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 2 ml Microcentrifuge Tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 2 ml Microcentrifuge Tube. Add 200 μl of Solution CD2 and vortex for 5 s.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 x g for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 x g for 1 min. Avoiding the pellet, transfer up to 650 μl of supernatant to a clean 2 ml Microcentrifuge Tube.

steps.title: Add 650 μl of Solution EA
steps.instruction: Add 650 μl of Solution EA. Vortex briefly.

steps.title: Load 650 μl supernatant-EA mix into...
steps.instruction: Load 650 μl supernatant-EA mix into an MB RNA Spin Column and centrifuge at 15,000x g for 1 min. Discard the flow-through and repeat until all of the solution has been passed through the Spin Column.

steps.title: Add 650 μl Solution EA to...
steps.instruction: Add 650 μl Solution EA to the Spin Column and centrifuge at 15,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Mix 45 μl DNase Digestion Solution...
steps.instruction: Mix 45 μl DNase Digestion Solution and 5 μl DNase I stock enzyme. Place the MB RNA Spin Column into a clean 2 ml Collection Tube and add the DNase Digestion Solution to the center of the filter. Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Add 650 μl Solution EA to...
steps.instruction: Add 650 μl Solution EA to the Spin Column and centrifuge at 15,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Discard the flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through. Add 500 μl Solution C5. Centrifuge at 15,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Replace the collection tube and dry...
steps.instruction: Replace the collection tube and dry the Spin Column by centrifuging at 20,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Elute the RNA by placing the...
steps.instruction: Elute the RNA by placing the spin column in a 1.5 ml collection tube. Add 100 μl of RNase-free water and centrifuge at 15,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Spin the PowerBead Pro Tube briefly...
steps.instruction: Spin the PowerBead Pro Tube briefly to ensure that the beads have settled at the bottom. Add 100 μl of phenol−chloroform−isoamyl alcohol to the PowerBead Pro Tube.
